title: Coconuts
body:
# Coconuts Pack 🥥
![Coconut Buckets Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/FdZFxHw1/images/a3c0679973901a5e057c617d2ab8ece7dd7352b2_350.webp)
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/FdZFxHw1/images/988dd64cfbc8c3a0aee19d372aabee3bf54bdb0e_350.webp)

## Overview
Transform your Minecraft world with a tropical twist! This resource pack replaces all standard buckets with coconut shells, adding a touch of beachy vibes to your game. Perfect for players looking to add a fun, island-inspired aesthetic to their inventory and adventures.


## Coconut Types
Each coconut variant serves the same function as the original bucket, but with a fresh look!

- **Empty Coconut** - Standard bucket replacement.
- **Water Coconut** - A coconut filled with refreshing water.
- **Lava Coconut** - Handle with care, as it’s packed with fiery lava!
- **Snow Coconut** - Cool and frosty, ideal for snow adventures.
- **Milk Coconut** - Fresh and nutritious, great for clearing effects.

## Installation
1. Download the resource pack and place it in your Minecraft resource packs folder.
2. Enable it in-game via **Options > Resource Packs**.
3. Enjoy your new tropical-themed buckets!

This pack is compatible with **[Minecraft versions 1.19 and above]**. Perfect for any player who wants a subtle, tropical visual change while keeping the vanilla game mechanics.

---

Bring a piece of paradise to your Minecraft inventory and dive into a world where every bucket is a coconut! 🌴🥥
